memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir John Bassett V (26 October 1518 – 21 April 1541)
memoryArtifacts.description: SIR JOHN BASSETT V, is the son of SIR JOHN BASSETT IV, and LADY HONOR GRENVILLE, daughter of SIR THOMAS GRENVILLE. Sir John Bassett IV and Lady Honor Grenville, had 7 children together, and they raise …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Basset於1518年10月26日出生在英國時，他的父親Sir John Bassett56歲，母親Honor Grenville29歲。他於1538年2月15日與Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1541年4月20日在他的家鄉享年22歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Basset于1518年10月26日出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir John Bassett56岁，母亲Honor Grenville29岁。他于1538年2月15日与Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1541年4月20日在他的家乡享年22岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Basset was born on 26 October 1518, in England, his father, Sir John Bassett, was 56 and his mother, Honor Grenville, was 29. He married Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet on 15 February 1538, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 April 1541, in his hometown, at the age of 22, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Basset est né le 26 octobre 1518, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John Bassett, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Honor Grenville, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet le 15 février 1538, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 avril 1541, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 22 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.Saint Mawgan-in-Meneage, Churchtown, Cor: St Mawgan, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Basset am 26. Oktober 1518 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Bassett 56 und seine Mutter Honor Grenville 29. Er hat am 15. Februar 1538 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. April 1541 im Alter von 22 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

it.Saint Mawgan-in-Meneage, Churchtown, Cor: St Mawgan, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando John Basset è nato il il 26 ottobre 1518 nel England, il suo padre, Sir John Bassett, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Honor Grenville, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet il 15 febbraio 1538, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 aprile 1541, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 22 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bassetが1518年10月26日にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John Bassettは56歳，母Honor Grenvilleは29歳であった。1538年2月15日にイギリスイギリスデボンでLady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1541年4月20日に故郷で22歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Basset(이)가 1518년 10월 26일 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Bassett(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Honor Grenville(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1538년 2월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1541년 4월 20일 그의 고향에서 22세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.26 October 1518–20 April 1541: 26 de outubro de 1518–20 de abril de 1541
pt.Saint Mawgan-in-Meneage, Churchtown, Cor: St Mawgan, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Basset nasceu em 26 de outubro de 1518, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Bassett, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Honor Grenville, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet em 15 de fevereiro de 1538, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de abril de 1541, em sua cidade natal, com 22 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ro.Saint Mawgan-in-Meneage, Churchtown, Cor: St Mawgan, Cornwall, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Basset родился 26 октября 1518 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Bassett было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Honor Grenville, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet 15 февраля 1538 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 апреля 1541 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 22 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.26 October 1518–20 April 1541: 26 de octubre de 1518–20 de abril de 1541
es.Saint Mawgan-in-Meneage, Churchtown, Cor: St Mawgan, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Basset nació el 26 de octubre de 1518, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Bassett, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Honor Grenville, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lady Frances Plantagenet, Baroness, co-Heiress, Countess of York Plantagenet el 15 de febrero de 1538, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de abril de 1541, en su pueblo, a la edad de 22 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
